name: Minimal Deep Research
description: Research, verify, and summarize a topic using staged read-only tasks.

phases.name: Source discovery
phases.description: Collect primary local evidence and implementation references.

tasks.name: Find official docs
tasks.prompt: Find official documentation or primary local source files relevant to: {{topic}}. Return paths, short snippets, and gaps. Do not modify files.

tasks.name: Find implementation evidence
tasks.prompt: Find concrete implementation examples in the current repository relevant to: {{topic}}. Return exact paths, symbols, and what each file proves. Do not modify files.

tasks.name: Identify risks and constraints
tasks.prompt: Review local evidence for risks, missing prerequisites, safety constraints, and likely failure modes for: {{topic}}. Do not modify files.

tasks.name: Summarize findings
tasks.prompt: Synthesize the prior phase outputs into a concise implementation-ready report for: {{topic}}. Include evidence paths, decisions, risks, and next steps.
